_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data and AI requirements, evaluating trade-offs between performance, maintainability, team capability, ecosystem maturity, and cost.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-003 (LS, cosine: 0.422), TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.412).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.529). Shared vocabulary: [ability, capability]. DCWF-only terms [conduct, pairing, tool] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, appropriate, cost, data, ecosystem, evaluating] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.890, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.045 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Ability to conduct tool/capability pairing." and "Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 ≈ STS 0.529 (gap 0.023). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [ability, capability] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [ability, capability]. DCWF-only: [conduct, pairing, tool]. WIDAI-only: [ai, appropriate, cost, data, ecosystem, evaluating].
